form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.84) when fifth over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (17.84) when fifth over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted the running rail in the first turn.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 3.5 lengths fourth (22.76) at Bulli. Previous form sound including a win three back at Bulli. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at Dubbo over 318m (18.44) beating Armoured Glass in Grade 5 on February 28. Looks a solid contender.

At the first turn hit the rail.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at Bulli over 340m (19.27) beating Freed Desire in Grade 5 on January 27. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Placed last time (20.31) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th over 365m at Nowra beaten 5.5 lengths (20.94) behind Where's Derek in a Grade 4/5 on March 30. Not far away last time but this is a stiff test.

At the first turn, shifted in and found contact.
Took an awkward stride entering the home straight and came together.
